markdownRemark.html:
Hi there! Welcome to my little corner of the internet!

I’ve been working on building this website for a while. Although I will continue to make updates to the style and structure, I’m finally putting it out there. I actually enjoyed designing and builing this website because I got to revisit web development- which is a skill I abandoned for a while. What pulled me through was the copious amount of tea (read: chai) and baked treats I had on the side.

This is where I plan to share a little bit of what I’m up to. I’m going to keep this one short, so thank you for stopping by, and maybe I’ll see you here again soon.
